_metadata.description: Published cIEF/icIEF and CEX charge variant reference profiles for clinical monoclonal antibodies
_metadata.purpose: Validation reference data for ProtePilot analytical QC twin cIEF predictions
notes: Charge variant percentages are expressed as % of total peak area
Acidic variants = species with lower pI than main peak (deamidation, sialylation, oxidation)
Basic variants = species with higher pI than main peak (C-terminal lysine, succinimide intermediates)
Values may differ between cIEF/icIEF and CEX methods; method is noted for each entry
Typical IgG mAb ranges: acidic 15-35%, main 45-70%, basic 8-25%

reference_profiles.source_title: Qualification of NISTmAb charge heterogeneity control assays
reference_profiles.notes: NIST reference standard. Within-day precision n=3: main 72.5+/-0.4%, acidic 19.9+/-0.5%, basic 7.6+/-0.2%. Historical iCIEF values: acidic 24.2%, main 66.6%, basic 9.2% (method-dependent differences).

reference_profiles.source_title: Qualification of NISTmAb charge heterogeneity control assays
reference_profiles.notes: Historical iCIEF data for comparison. Differences from optimized method attributed to data analysis and integration parameters.

reference_profiles.source_title: Trastuzumab Charge Variants: a Study on Physicochemical and Pharmacokinetic Properties
reference_profiles.notes: pI ranges: acidic 8.1-8.4, main 8.5, basic 8.6-8.7. No significant influence on efficacy or PK parameters. Isolated variant purity: acidic 98.1%, main 90.1%, basic 92.1%.

reference_profiles.source_title: Multi-antibody charge variant analysis (control sample data)
reference_profiles.notes: Control sample values from iCIEF-UV analysis. pI range 8.7-8.9. Method-dependent: CEX fractionation gives higher acidic % due to different separation principles.

reference_profiles.source_title: Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies
reference_profiles.source_journal: Journal of Chromatography B, 2017 (Goyon et al.)
reference_profiles.notes: pI ~8.7-8.9. Research grade material has lower basic species and higher main peak vs. originator. Generic icIEF may overestimate acidic variants relative to CEX.

reference_profiles.source_title: Comparative analytical profiling of bevacizumab biosimilars marketed in India
reference_profiles.source_journal: European Journal of Drug Metabolism and Pharmacokinetics, 2020 (PMC7652956)
reference_profiles.notes: Innovator (Avastin). cIEF values: acidic 21.4+/-0.7%, main 74.8+/-0.1%, basic 3.6+/-0.5%. pI range 7.8-8.4.

reference_profiles.source_title: Comparative analytical profiling of bevacizumab biosimilars marketed in India
reference_profiles.source_journal: European Journal of Drug Metabolism and Pharmacokinetics, 2020 (PMC7652956)
reference_profiles.notes: Innovator (Avastin) by CEX-HPLC. Values: acidic 25.0+/-1.4%, main 70.4+/-4.1%, basic 4.4+/-2.7%.

reference_profiles.source_title: Charge Variants of an Avastin Biosimilar: Isolation, Characterization, In Vitro Properties and Pharmacokinetics in Rat
reference_profiles.notes: Avastin innovator values: acidic 15%, main 74%, basic 11%. Biosimilar: acidic 15%, main 75%, basic 10%. icIEF pI range 7.8-8.4.

reference_profiles.source_title: Structural and Functional Analysis of CEX Fractions from a Novel Avastin Biosimilar and Innovator
reference_profiles.notes: Avastin innovator (AVT): acidic 26%, main 65.3%, basic 8%. Biosimilar SIMAB054: acidic 19%, main 55.8%, basic 25%.

reference_profiles.source_title: ABP 215 Bevacizumab Biosimilar FDA Advisory Committee
reference_profiles.notes: ABP 215 (Mvasi): main peak 66.9-70.4%, acidic 19.8-23.9%, basic 8.6-11.3%. Midpoints used. Slightly higher basic variants due to unprocessed C-terminal lysine vs. bevacizumab.

reference_profiles.source_title: High-Flow Weak Cation Exchange for Charge Variant Analysis
reference_profiles.notes: At 1 mL/min: 17% acidic, ~73% main (inferred), 10% basic. At 3 mL/min: 15% acidic, 12% basic. Flow-rate dependent resolution. pI ~8.7-9.4.

reference_profiles.source_title: How Similar Is Biosimilar? A Comparison of Infliximab Therapeutics in Regard to Charge Variant Profile and Antigen Binding Affinity
reference_profiles.notes: Originator Remicade profile: 3 acidic variants (A1-A3), main peak (M), 3 basic variants (B1-B3). B2/B3 present in Remicade, Inflectra, Remsima but absent in Flixabi. Differences not clinically relevant. Estimated from published figures.

reference_profiles.source_title: Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies
reference_profiles.source_journal: Journal of Chromatography B, 2017 (Goyon et al.)
reference_profiles.notes: 8 isoforms with pI 7.46-8.46. High charge heterogeneity due to Fab sialylation (NGNA), C-terminal lysine. 5 acidic variants (A1-A5), main peak, 3 basic variants (B1-B3). Comparable values by pH/salt gradient: acidic 33.5%/26.6%, main 53.3%/53.5%, basic 13.2%/19.9%.

reference_profiles.source_title: Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies
reference_profiles.source_journal: Journal of Chromatography B, 2017 (Goyon et al.)
reference_profiles.notes: Same sample as pH gradient entry. Demonstrates method-dependence of charge variant quantitation. Salt gradient gives lower acidic and higher basic percentages.

reference_profiles.source_title: Pembrolizumab product quality review
reference_profiles.notes: IgG4 with S228P hinge stabilization mutation. Lower pI than IgG1 mAbs. Values estimated from regulatory review summaries. IgG4 mAbs typically show less C-terminal lysine heterogeneity.

reference_profiles.source_title: In Vitro Characterization of the Anti-PD-1 Antibody Nivolumab, BMS-936558
reference_profiles.notes: Fully human IgG4 (S228P). pI ~7.5-8.0. Charge heterogeneity sources: deamidation, oxidation, C-terminal lysine. Values estimated from published cIEF electropherograms. Acid-induced aggregation propensity Fc-dependent.

reference_profiles.source_title: Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies
reference_profiles.source_journal: Journal of Chromatography B, 2017 (Goyon et al.)
reference_profiles.notes: Part of 23-mAb panel study. pI ~9.0. IgG1 with typical charge variant profile. Acidic/basic variants between 15-30% as reported for most mAbs in the panel.

reference_profiles.source_title: Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies
reference_profiles.source_journal: Journal of Chromatography B, 2017 (Goyon et al.)
reference_profiles.notes: Human IgG2. Part of 23-mAb panel. IgG2 has additional disulfide bond heterogeneity contributing to charge variants. CEX profiles in good agreement with published literature.

reference_profiles.source_title: Charge variants of proposed biosimilar to Omalizumab: Isolation, purification and analysis by HPLC methods
reference_profiles.notes: Low pI for an IgG1 (~7.6). Purity of isolated fractions: acidic 94.25%, main 95.58%, basic 91.33% by CEX-HPLC. Values are for a proposed biosimilar; innovator expected to be comparable.

reference_profiles.source_title: LC-MS based case-by-case analysis of the impact of acidic and basic charge variants of bevacizumab on stability and biological activity
reference_profiles.notes: Commercial biosimilar product - less heterogeneous than in-house. Predominantly one main unmodified product. In-house product: acidic 8.0%, main 34.7%, basic 57.3% (5 basic sub-peaks).

summary_statistics.description: Aggregated ranges from published data across all entries

IgG1_typical_ranges.notes: Wide variability due to molecule-specific properties (glycosylation, deamidation sites, C-terminal lysine processing) and method differences (cIEF vs CEX, salt vs pH gradient)

IgG4_typical_ranges.notes: IgG4 mAbs generally have lower pI (7.0-8.0), S228P mutation reduces Fab-arm exchange. Less C-terminal lysine heterogeneity than IgG1.

method_comparison_notes: iCIEF tends to overestimate acidic variants compared to CEX for some mAbs
CEX salt gradient and pH gradient can give different relative percentages
NISTmAb showed 6% difference in main peak between optimized cIEF (72.5%) and historical iCIEF (66.6%)
Integration parameters and baseline selection significantly affect reported percentages

key_references.citation: Goyon A, et al. Determination of isoelectric points and relative charge variants of 23 therapeutic monoclonal antibodies. J Chromatogr B. 2017;1065-1066:119-128.
key_references.description: Comprehensive panel of 23 FDA/EMA-approved mAbs analyzed by icIEF and CEX (salt and pH gradient). pI range 6.1-9.4. Acidic/basic variants 15-30% for most mAbs.

key_references.citation: Turner A, et al. Qualification of NISTmAb charge heterogeneity control assays. Anal Bioanal Chem. 2018;410(8):2079-2093.
key_references.description: NISTmAb RM 8671 optimized cIEF assay qualification with precision data.

key_references.citation: Trastuzumab Charge Variants: a Study on Physicochemical and Pharmacokinetic Properties. Pharm Res. 2023.
key_references.description: Trastuzumab charge variant isolation and characterization showing no significant PK/efficacy impact.

key_references.citation: Comparative analytical profiling of bevacizumab biosimilars marketed in India. Eur J Drug Metab Pharmacokinet. 2020.
key_references.description: Innovator Avastin vs 3 biosimilars by cIEF and CEX-HPLC with full percentage data.

key_references.citation: Charge Variants of an Avastin Biosimilar: Isolation, Characterization, In Vitro Properties and Pharmacokinetics in Rat. PLOS ONE. 2016.
key_references.description: Bevacizumab biosimilar with CEX and icIEF charge variant data.

key_references.citation: Beyer B, et al. How Similar Is Biosimilar? A Comparison of Infliximab Therapeutics in Regard to Charge Variant Profile and Antigen Binding Affinity. Biotechnol J. 2019.
key_references.description: Infliximab originator (Remicade) vs biosimilars (Inflectra, Remsima, Flixabi) charge variant comparison.

key_references.citation: LC-MS based case-by-case analysis of the impact of acidic and basic charge variants of bevacizumab on stability and biological activity. Sci Rep. 2021.
key_references.description: Bevacizumab charge variant characterization with stability and activity correlation.

key_references.citation: Structural and Functional Analysis of CEX Fractions from a Novel Avastin Biosimilar and Innovator. Pharm Res. 2022.
key_references.description: Avastin innovator vs SIMAB054 biosimilar CEX charge variant data.
